Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: E273 - Potato Puff / There Will Be Grease!
programme.desc: Mrs. Puff's new substitute teacher gives SpongeBob a crash course in driving. // Mr. Krabs and Plankton must work together after discovering a well of miracle-grease under their restaurants.

programme.title: E104 - Houbi Houba Heist / Twister's Treehouse
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: E412 - Visiting Vikings / It's Too Late...With Plankton
programme.desc: For Leif Erikson Day, Patrick and SpongeBob time-travel back to Viking times. // When the Stars go to the mountains, Squidina hires Plankton to entertain the Lawnies.

programme.title: E244 - Pineapple RV
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick turn the pineapple into a mobile home to take Squidward on the road trip he deserves.

programme.title: E903 - Meet the Purrents / Apartment Complex
programme.desc: When Lori and Bobby find a kitten, they decide to coparent and swap the kitten back and forth between their homes. // After telling her family how great her apartment is, Lori unknowingly entices her sisters to secretly take over her space.

programme.title: E122 - Dance, Dance Resolution / A Fair to Remember
programme.desc: It’s the Sadie Hawkins dance at school and Lincoln’s sisters have accidentally landed him four dates! // When Lincoln and Bobby become friends, Lori sets out to make Bobby jealous by hanging out with Clyde.

programme.title: E184 - Jailbreak! / Evil Spatula
programme.desc: An imprisoned Plankton teams up with his fellow inmates to break out of jail and steal the Krabby Patty secret formula. // SpongeBob replaces his broken spatula with one from Plankton, which may or may not have magical powers.

programme.title: E122 - Dance, Dance Resolution / A Fair to Remember
programme.desc: It’s the Sadie Hawkins dance at school and Lincoln’s sisters have accidentally landed him four dates! // When Lincoln and Bobby become friends, Lori sets out to make Bobby jealous by hanging out with Clyde.

programme.title: E207 - Endless Summer
programme.desc: Max pretends to turn evil to infiltrate Mastermind's henchmen and steal the Chip-Chucker, a device that previously turned him evil.

programme.title: E512 - The Whole Bilsky Family
programme.desc: Henry's nerves are put the test when Piper invites her new boyfriend and his family over for dinner.

programme.title: E412 - Visiting Vikings / It's Too Late...With Plankton
programme.desc: For Leif Erikson Day, Patrick and SpongeBob time-travel back to Viking times. // When the Stars go to the mountains, Squidina hires Plankton to entertain the Lawnies.

programme.title: E201 - Sandy's Nutmare
programme.desc: Sandy creates the latest acorn-based food sensation, but her tree pays the price for her greed.

programme.title: E122 - Captain Man Strikes Out
programme.desc: When Captain Man goes on strike because he refuses to pay for art that he destroyed on a mission, the Vice-Mayor hires a new hero to defend Swellview - Monsieur Man.

programme.title: E275 - Food PBBFT! Truck / Upturn Girls
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Squidward try to sell krabby patties from a food truck in the darkest depths of the ocean. // Pearl and Narlene have a whales' day out in the big city.

programme.title: E244 - Pineapple RV
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick turn the pineapple into a mobile home to take Squidward on the road trip he deserves.

programme.title: E413 - Terror on Tape
programme.desc: The Stars watch a series of haunted video tapes.

programme.title: E213 - Cleanin' House
programme.desc: While Bunny's in Klopnod, the Star home becomes a mess.

programme.title: E711 - Leave No Van Behind / Sponsor Tripped
programme.desc: Vanzilla breaks down. // Lynn and friends enjoy free perks around Royal Wood.

programme.title: E309 - JAM Session
programme.desc: When Ray hears that Piper is going to Junior Anger Management to work on her anger issues, he makes a wager with Henry that he can make her lose her temper before the night ends.

programme.title: E102 - Stair Wars
programme.desc: Patrick and GrandPat try to pass each other on the stairs, leading to a ludicrous conflict.

programme.title: E124 - Funny Business / Snow Bored
programme.desc: Lincoln becomes Luan's clown assistant but starts hogging the spotlight. // The Loud kids set out to show Lisa what is 'fun' about a snow day.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: Chef Edward Lee and Ryu Sooyoung embark on their final seasonal journey, beginning in Yangyang where native salmon return to spawn. Their adventure moves to Sokcho for yellowtail and Dokdo shrimp, before joining a gimbap picnic.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: Sue reaches the final episode with a visit to the country's heady and exotic capital, Bangkok.

programme.title: E4 - Lemon Sharks
programme.desc: Some of the team explores the mangroves, which are essential for the survival of some sharks. While there, they come face to face with baby lemon sharks.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: We go behind the scenes with Coca Cola Zero Sugar as they produce 1 billion litres of the iconic drink. A Finnish company revolutionizes the propulsion system that propels a cruise ship. Plus the USA cook up a storm and a classic British motorcycle rolls off the production line every 45 seconds in India.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: We go behind the scenes with Coca Cola Zero Sugar as they produce 1 billion litres of the iconic drink. programme.title: Pavarotti
programme.desc: A look at the life and work of opera legend, Luciano Pavarotti.

programme.title: I, Daniel Blake
programme.desc: A middle-aged carpenter requires state welfare after injuring himself. Palme D’Or winner at the Cannes Film Festival.

programme.title: Dancing Pina
programme.desc: Two spectacular dance projects show how a young generation of dancers from all over the world are rediscovering Pina's choreography: the Semperoper Ballet Company in Dresden rehearses Pina's dance opera Iphigenia in Tauris, and dancers from all over Africa rehearse Pina's ballet Le Sacre du Printemps at the École des Sables in Senegal.

programme.title: Pavarotti
programme.desc: A look at the life and work of opera legend, Luciano Pavarotti.

programme.title: Dancing Pina
programme.desc: Two spectacular dance projects show how a young generation of dancers from all over the world are rediscovering Pina's choreography: the Semperoper Ballet Company in Dresden rehearses Pina's dance opera Iphigenia in Tauris, and dancers from all over Africa rehearse Pina's ballet Le Sacre du Printemps at the École des Sables in Senegal.

programme.title: E1 - Benjamin Vedrines, The Mountaineer Of Every Exploit
programme.desc: Originally from the Drome, in the small village of Chatillon-en-Diois, the professional mountaineer Benjamin Vedrines knows the Ecrins massif well. Among other feats, he climbed the Dibona Needle in one hour and twenty-four minutes, a record-breaking performance achieved alone and without protection.

programme.title: E3 - The Magic Potion
programme.desc: Several Komians are busy around a large cauldron closely supervised by the High Priestess. Pokou manages to escape with the young boy who had set the trap for the Komian, before saving her.

programme.title: E33 - Where Did Coin-Coin Come From?
programme.desc: In Super-Cute-Land, Kaeloo, Stumpy, Quack-Quack and Mr. Cat play a new game every day. And for that they love nothing better than making up their own rules and asking loads of questions about the world around them: with this lot you can never be sure of what will happen next!

programme.title: E17 - Rohulla Hossiny (Afghanistan)
programme.desc: At 17, fleeing the Taliban, Rohullah Hossiny travels through Iran, Turkey, and Greece before arriving in Belgium. In Brussels, thanks to the Duo for a job association, he finds a mentor and joins Corica, where he becomes a master roaster. In turn, he trains other exiles.

It's Showtime
programme.desc: 'It's Showtime' is a hit variety program that thrives on spontaneity and animated conversations.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Encantadia Chronicles: Sang'gre
programme.desc: The series is a spin-off to the Philippine television fantasy drama series, Encantadia.

programme.title: Encantadia Chronicles: Sang'gre
programme.desc: The series is a spin-off to the Philippine television fantasy drama series, Encantadia.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Encantadia Chronicles: Sang'gre
programme.desc: The series is a spin-off to the Philippine television fantasy drama series, Encantadia.

programme.title: Encantadia Chronicles: Sang'gre
programme.desc: The series is a spin-off to the Philippine television fantasy drama series, Encantadia.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: TV Patrol Express[Live]
programme.desc: TV Patrol Express, hosted by Jeff Canoy and Denice Dinsay is a quick look at the top stories of the day. A fifteen minute fast-paced newscast, it offers a glimpse of breaking news, stories that developed, and updates to watch out for on TV Patrol for the on-the-go viewer.

programme.title: TV Patrol Live[Live]
programme.desc: ABS-CBN's flagship newscast and the country's leading news program in the past two decades, anchored by the most celebrated news team ever assembled in the history of Philippine broadcasting.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.desc: A gag show with child actors playing adult roles, doing gags, sketches and segments. Instead of playing roles based on their own age, child actors are made to portray adult characters like Doctors, Teachers, Married Couples, etc.

programme.title: German In A Happy Mood
programme.desc: Let's learn simple and easy-to-remember phrases, looking at a modern Europe that cherishes its history and traditions while pursuing a lifestyle that fits its stature. programme.title: Seto Kanna: The Awakening Of Hidden Desire
Seto Kanna: The Awakening Of Hidden Desire
E2 - Living on the Edge
programme.desc: The plains and woodlands of the Luangwa Valley are the wildest and most merciless of all neighborhoods where duels between predator and prey are played out both day and night. For the animals that call this home, it’s a daily battle to stay alive.

programme.title: E4 - The Leopard Who Changed Her Spots
programme.desc: Meet pampered young leopardess Chipadzua, who has never had to hunt for food, thanks to her patient mother. Alone for the first time in her life, will she develop the skills it takes to survive?

programme.title: E3 - Meerkat Survival School
programme.desc: Learn how to disarm and dine on scorpions with meerkat pups in the Kalahari Desert and review a lioness’ flirting strategy in Kenya. Meet same-sex penguin couples who are raising chicks together, then sign up for an Asian elephant babysitters’ club.

programme.title: E5 - Boreal
programme.desc: Travel to the Arctic for a peek at the brutal challenges of life in the boreal forest, then admire some stellar animal adaptations. Witness a secret reindeer superpower, navigate a rodent labyrinth of snow, and learn why moose are gourmets at heart.

programme.title: Tera Kya Hoga Lovely
programme.desc: A comedy of errors that traverses through the hinterlands of Haryana unfolding crazy dynamics, relationships and eccentricities that occur between family, friends, lovers, and even cops!.

programme.title: Kuch Naa Kaho
programme.desc: A secretary's manager tells her to find a match for his nephew who does not want to get married. The nephew rejects every proposal and falls in love with the secretary instead.

programme.title: Ismart Shankar
programme.desc: Shankar, a contract killer, manages to escape after murdering a politician. Later, he helps the police find a murderer when an officer's memory is transferred to him.

programme.title: Cats the Musical
programme.desc: The Buffycats are organizing the annual Cat Party. Thanks to a pawesome Buffy-Brainstorm, they set up a musical with all the 44 cats! Everyone joins the show... Boss, Blister and Scab included, thanks to their talent for mischief!

programme.title: The Catalyst
programme.desc: Raign, Joy, and Hulk get thrown in detention and discover a trap door leading to mysterious tunnels. They must work with the school bully - Brett - to solve the riddle before their time is up.

programme.title: Banana Split
programme.desc: The little cooks make a simple yet delicious recipe, and Telmo even dares to add some pepper in the dessert.

programme.title: New Zealand
programme.desc: Explored Auckland's War Memorial Museum, Waitomo's glowworms, Queenstown's skyline gondola, 415-ft bungy jump at Kawaru Bridge, and a thrilling shotover jet ride-unforgettable week in New Zealand!

programme.title: Motor Is Missing
programme.desc: Flippy arrives at Motor's house-only to find him missing and his wheelchair locked inside. With Robbie's help, they launch a search. After Robbie claims men are smarter, it's boys vs. girls in a race to solve the mystery. But with Motor, anything could've happened!

programme.title: Heni's Chicken Coop
programme.desc: When Heni's new chickens take over her garden, Darwin and Newts come up with a plan to keep everyone happy.

programme.title: Eric's Bear Paws
programme.desc: Eric learns that many animals have developed an insulating coat of fat to keep them warm and dry. He uses this idea to create a way to put his hand in very cold water without getting hurt.

programme.title: Lighting the Solar System
programme.desc: What's the best way to remember the colours of the rainbow? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of light in space. Have hands-on fun by creating a kaleidoscope, and get to know Wang Zhenyi, who originated her own exact model of the solar system.

programme.title: Periscope
programme.desc: Look round a corner or over a wall, with this clever device you can see like you're tall!

programme.title: #StudentAstronaut Contest: Russia
programme.desc: Host Emily Calandrelli holds the fourth annual #StudentAstronaut Contest. One lucky student wins a trip to Russia to train like a cosmonaut at the Yuri Gagarin Cosmonaut Training Center.

programme.title: Eric's Bear Paws
programme.desc: Eric learns that many animals have developed an insulating coat of fat to keep them warm and dry. He uses this idea to create a way to put his hand in very cold water without getting hurt.

programme.title: Darwin and Newts Go Flat Out
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts have a fun but fair football game after discovering that their football pitch is tilted and figuring out how to fix it.

programme.title: Trip to Greece
programme.desc: Zoe finds Milo sobbing, but he insists it's just dust-boys don't cry! Alim sighs and takes them to Greece's Mytilene, where they meet Nicolai. There, they learn that men and women freely express their emotions, crying with joy or sadness.

programme.title: Trip to Indonesia
programme.desc: Zoe makes a gift for her friend Noa, puzzling Milo-she's given Noa gifts before! Zoe says she has many friends named Noa. Alim suggests it's because they're the eldest. To show how names relate to birth order, he takes them to Bali, where many people are named Wayan

programme.title: Eric Makes Paper!
programme.desc: Eric learns how to make a beautiful sheet of recycled paper. He finds out what people used to write on before paper was invented.

programme.title: Heni's Chicken Coop
programme.desc: When Heni's new chickens take over her garden, Darwin and Newts come up with a plan to keep everyone happy.

programme.title: Magical Leo
programme.desc: When Bumble notices that Leo has hidden wings, she's convinced that Leo must be magical. Bumble gathers the entire town to worship Leo and gets her help for all sorts of problems. But Leo's not magical at all, so how will she get out of this predicament?

programme.title: Tongue Tongs
programme.desc: Tongue-tong is the newest supervillain weapon against Sprinter. Sprinter uses his wit and gives the villains a taste of their own medicine.

programme.title: Troubadours and Minstrels
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, listening to music for entertainment is a much-appreciated pastime. Singers and musicians of that era travel round Europe singing their poetry. Famous minstrel Howler is a huge hit at a fiery banquet in his lordship's court.

programme.title: Stars in a Jar
programme.desc: Eric learns constellations are groups of stars and that they often have shapes that look like animals, objects, or even people. He makes a lantern that can project the constellation Ursa Major, also known as the Great Bear because it looks like a big bear in the sky.

programme.title: Myths and Legends
programme.desc: After taking care of his daily chores, Howler ‘gets away from it all' by daydreaming about wonderful encounters! In the process, he takes us through various contemporary beliefs, myths and legends, powered by his very rich imagination.

programme.title: Stars in a Jar
programme.desc: Eric learns constellations are groups of stars and that they often have shapes that look like animals, objects, or even people. He makes a lantern that can project the constellation Ursa Major, also known as the Great Bear because it looks like a big bear in the sky.

programme.title: Young Simon Says
programme.desc: Teresa has a brilliant idea for fighting Simon: bring his happy, popular 12-year-old self here from the past and show him what he risks becoming due to his unhealthy preoccupation with aliens.

programme.title: Stars in a Jar
programme.desc: Eric learns constellations are groups of stars and that they often have shapes that look like animals, objects, or even people. He makes a lantern that can project the constellation Ursa Major, also known as the Great Bear because it looks like a big bear in the sky.

programme.title: Mega Muscles!
programme.desc: Dr Xand arm wrestles the world's strongest woman to help find out how muscles grow. And the doctors reveal the Top 5 Bizarre Things Your Body Can Do!

programme.title: Touching A Cloud
programme.desc: The UK's biggest rising trampoline star, Corey, leaves the rest of the squad desperate to follow in his footsteps. Chase and Lainie go out on their first date, and Dove is desperate to know if Coach Nikki has found her a new partner.

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 講述兩名截然不同的人 ─ 缺乏同情心的騙子與同情心氾濫的律師因與邪惡抗爭，組成了一支看起來不太可能實現的聯盟後所發生的故事。

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E57
programme.desc: 此劇敘述年幼便出道養家的一線女演員與PD的愛情故事。女演員因母親賭博的債務及醜聞一夜之間跌落谷底。PD嘗試鼓勵她重新振作，女演員卻消失了……

programme.title: E105 - Save The Loo Bru
programme.desc: Buster meets his nemesis, Montana Max, and must apply a new lesson from Bugs about drag to keep the Loo Bru from demolition.

programme.title: E54 - Joy Ride/Love Letters
programme.desc: The Cool Kids help Steven put some fun back in his life.

programme.title: E5 - The Unicorns Have Got To Go/Appreciation Day/Out Of Commission/That's My Television/G
programme.desc: Mordecai buys a new cologne to attract Margaret instead of hanging out with Rigby like he promised.

programme.title: E266 - Buktu The Future/Bomzobo Lives/Animorphosis/Assault On Pancake Palace/Gentle Ben
programme.desc: After Tim Buktu's live stream is mysteriously cut short, Team Tennyson must attempt a rescue mission and break inside the highly confidential Area 55 in order to save him.

programme.title: E166 - Pain Rent / Nest Effort/Feather Of The Bride/ Daffy Magician: Pick A Card/ Bugs Hole
programme.desc: Bugs’ new roommate is a big, big problem. Daffy builds a nest in Elmer’s satellite dish.

programme.title: E69 - The Sale/The Routine/The Parking/The Upgrade/The Comic
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin are devastated to learn that Mr Robinson - their favourite person in the world - is selling his house and leaving town. When they realise that making some final happy memories with Mr Robinson is not enough for them, they decide to stop him leaving, by sabotaging the sale.

programme.title: E85 - Steven Floats/Too Short To Ride/Drop Beat Dad
programme.desc: Steven is so excited to be back home that he jumps for joy, and jumps way too high.

programme.title: UCI Europe Tour - Tour de la Provence
HSBC BWF World Tour 2026 Orleans Masters Badminton 2026 presented by VICTOR -Final Mixed Doubles

E1 - The Big Deal
programme.desc: Claudia’s season starts off with a bang when she receives a $250,000 jade order, but things quickly turn sour when her crew questions if they have a big enough boulder to complete the sale.

programme.title: E2 - The Last Laugh
programme.desc: After years of getting the raw end of the deal with Scrappy Larry, Robin pulls a prank on his old buddy, but the fun and games end when Claudia’s buyer makes an unexpected request.

programme.title: E4 - Flamethrower vs. Fire Truck
programme.desc: This episode of Showdown of the Unbeatables features the Brokk robot versus Brian Shaw, the world’s strongest man; the E-One fire truck versus Charlie Hobson, a flamethrower expert; and the Cold Jet ice blaster versus Tuff N Lite fabric.

programme.title: E1 - South Australia
programme.desc: In the first part of the episode, Andy explores sustainable kingfish farming in Spencer Gulf, South Australia, visiting Clean Seas sea farm and preparing fresh kingfish sashimi with the team. Moving to Kangaroo Island, he learns pickling techniques with Kate from Kangaroo Island Source, showcasing her products in a Carne Asada Taco. The episode continues with Andy exploring d'Arenberg's multi-function building and 'The Cube,' experiencing a Chef's Table, and concludes at Wirra Wirra winery, where he cooks Yogurt Flatbread with Olive Oil and Dukka, enjoying it with the staff and their wines.

programme.title: E2 - Northern Territory
programme.desc: In Kakadu National Park, Andy joins Dewayne Webb foraging pandanus and cooking Seared Buffalo with Pandanus & Charred Herb Salsa over an open fire. He then heads to Darwin, assisting Zach Green at Elijah’s Kitchen, a food truck offering indigenous-inspired meals like Magpie Goose and Crocodile Laksa. Returning to Kakadu, Andy goes fishing with local Barramundi expert Rob Johnson and prepares Paperbark Leaf BBQ Barramundi with Sour Tamarind Sauce at Anbangbang Billabong, showcasing the region's environment and produce.

programme.title: E5 - Missing Home
programme.desc: Sarah visits the laundry district of Dhobi Ghat, one of the world's largest outdoor laundries. Further setbacks at the restaurant and the furious pace of Mumbai are beginning to wear Sarah down as the opening night gets closer.

programme.title: E6 - Restaurant Launch
programme.desc: With only hours before the restaurant is due to open the kitchen remains in chaos. Together with Head Chef Himanil, Sarah must bring some order to the kitchen team as they try to deliver on Sarah’s new menu.

programme.title: E4 - Flamethrower vs. Fire Truck
programme.desc: This episode of Showdown of the Unbeatables features the Brokk robot versus Brian Shaw, the world’s strongest man; the E-One fire truck versus Charlie Hobson, a flamethrower expert; and the Cold Jet ice blaster versus Tuff N Lite fabric.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 圍繞「兼職女王」辛桐與四海集團繼承人聞裴安展開，辛桐為替閨蜜搞砸相親而錯誤結識聞裴安，聞裴安因家族逼婚僱傭辛桐假扮契約情侶，二人由此開啟與戀愛監察特工斗智斗勇的爆笑同居之旅。

programme.title: 2025 Jiangsu Count Down Concert (Repackaged)
programme.desc: 晚會將繼續以劉宇寧、薛之謙、周深、單依純、黃子弘凡等頂級唱將陣容點燃期待，以科技舞美賦能全新視聽體驗，繼續以「用奮斗點亮幸福」為主題，一起迎接更好2025。

programme.title: E2 - 蘭亭集序(下)
programme.desc: 中的名場面，用現代方式表達其中蘊藏的經典文化與精神內涵，彰顯中華文明突出特性。邀請陳銘、喻恩泰、楊迪、王子異組成「萬卷遊學團」，羅一舟、張凌赫、張曉龍、王耀慶、王鶴棣、曾可妮作為「風雅體驗官」，分別體驗五場穿越千年的古今同游，根據遊學攻略不斷加載知識技能，最終完成「傳世名作名場面」的融創秀。

programme.title: E7 - 趙又廷林更新兄弟反目
programme.desc: 全明星沉浸式劇情體驗綜藝；圍繞遊戲、喜劇兩大元素，以社會熱點話題為創作基礎，打造不同遊戲主題。一個盒子空間，一群神秘玩家，他們需要在各種離奇、爆笑和反轉中，一步步揭開故事真相，走出盒子，體驗一場專屬的心靈療愈之旅。

programme.title: E3 - 小木屋重組搭檔
programme.desc: 由黎明、林依晨、魏晨、謝依霖、鄭元暢、盛一倫、朱珠、李小鵬、王濛、潘曉婷、唐曉天、陳楚河共十二位明星和奧運冠軍參加，以輪換搭檔的形式，在全球十二座體育城市展開一系列競技PK。

programme.title: E2 - 蘭亭集序(下)
programme.desc: 中的名場面，用現代方式表達其中蘊藏的經典文化與精神內涵，彰顯中華文明突出特性。邀請陳銘、喻恩泰、楊迪、王子異組成「萬卷遊學團」，羅一舟、張凌赫、張曉龍、王耀慶、王鶴棣、曾可妮作為「風雅體驗官」，分別體驗五場穿越千年的古今同游，根據遊學攻略不斷加載知識技能，最終完成「傳世名作名場面」的融創秀。

programme.title: E9 - 闖關「尋寶」 集體追溯歷史蹤跡
programme.desc: 繼續重磅集結，除了經驗豐富的 “全勤者” 吳奇隆外，新成員林峯、丁禹兮、林允、趙小棠也加入「追星團」；在「星空日記」的魔法下，將打游戲的宅男、疲憊的職場打工人和沉浸於網上沖浪的情侶帶出原有空間一路滑行到戶外，讓受困於都市生活的他們探尋星空與美好的秘密。

programme.title: E5 - 娘娘團出宮露營
programme.desc: 蔡少芬、陶昕然、斕曦、張曉龍、藍盈瑩、陳思斯、楊九郎時隔13年後首次合體重聚，以全新的面貌組成「煥新團」，從承載無數記憶的《甄嬛傳》拍攝地北京大觀園出發，自北向南，由東向西，前往全國多個寶藏民族文化發源地，通過深度探訪、遊學，體驗各地民俗文化和風土人情，帶著回憶和新的憧憬環遊全國以完成“煥新之旅”。

programme.title: E5 - 娘娘團出宮露營
programme.desc: 蔡少芬、陶昕然、斕曦、張曉龍、藍盈瑩、陳思斯、楊九郎時隔13年後首次合體重聚，以全新的面貌組成「煥新團」，從承載無數記憶的《甄嬛傳》拍攝地北京大觀園出發，自北向南，由東向西，前往全國多個寶藏民族文化發源地，通過深度探訪、遊學，體驗各地民俗文化和風土人情，帶著回憶和新的憧憬環遊全國以完成“煥新之旅”。

programme.title: E9 - 闖關「尋寶」 集體追溯歷史蹤跡
programme.desc: 繼續重磅集結，除了經驗豐富的 “全勤者” 吳奇隆外，新成員林峯、丁禹兮、林允、趙小棠也加入「追星團」；在「星空日記」的魔法下，將打游戲的宅男、疲憊的職場打工人和沉浸於網上沖浪的情侶帶出原有空間一路滑行到戶外，讓受困於都市生活的他們探尋星空與美好的秘密。

programme.title: E39 - Dragon Boat Beats
programme.desc: The Supermarket is frozen over and Supertato, Carrot, Broccoli and Tomato practice for the boat race by using chopsticks for oars, but it doesn't go well as they're out of sync with each other.

programme.title: E6 - Monster Popcorn
programme.desc: After a button-pressing 'accident' at the Fab Food Factory, a giant popcorn is on the loose in OKIDO. Will Messy and Zoom be able to stop it before it flattens the city?

programme.title: E13 - Master Of Puppets
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.title: E18 - Shopping Shenanigans, Istanbul, Turkey
programme.desc: Glitch's wishes cause underground trouble in Istanbul - an ancient ceiling may collapse!

programme.title: E41 - Bin Night
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo and Dad always take out the bins. Over a few weeks, Bingo tells Dad about a new kid at kindy who is mean to her and Mum offers some good advice.

programme.title: E5 - Born Yesterday
programme.desc: Dad pretends he was born yesterday. Bluey and Bingo have to guide him through his second day on Earth, especially when he discovers food is delicious and steals Lucky's Dad's pie.

programme.title: E26 - Andy And The Saddleback Clownfish
programme.desc: When the saddleback clownfish leave the safety of their carpet anemone home back at Safari World, Andy travels to the Great Barrier Reef in Australia to find out why.

programme.title: E14 - The Train Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is playing with his train set. Choo-choo! It's amazing! The squirrels are curious and want to know all about it.

programme.title: E13 - The Dancing Bug Badge
programme.desc: When a dancing bug lands on Duggee's head, he can't stop dancing. The Squirrels see that it's a tiny hillbilly bug with a fiddle. And what's more, he's got a band with him - the Hillbilly Bug Band.

programme.title: E23 - Go Jet Academy: Hurricane Rescue
programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch tries to rescue a Grimbot from an Atlantic hurricane. The Go Jetters have to rescue him!

programme.title: E9 - Diesel Do Right
programme.desc: After being scolded for making a mistake, Diesel plays a trick on Rebecca to try and get the other engines in trouble.

programme.title: E13 - Shallot Circus
programme.desc: The Shallots have discovered acrobatics and are inspired to put on a show.

programme.title: E25 - Delivery
programme.desc: Stanley helps Hattie, Fred, and Fifi with a new food delivery service. It starts well, except with each delivery a problem arises. Stanley must solve them before Myrtle's party.

programme.title: E10 - I Just Like Worms
programme.desc: From snails called David to Daddy Spider Longlegs', the funny animals talk about all things creepy and crawly.

programme.title: E36 - Dirt
programme.desc: Judo desperately wants to play in the dirt with Bluey and Bingo, but she is not supposed to get herself dirty.

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。

programme.desc: An entertaining and informative cooking program that showcases scrumptious cuisines. Together with the celebrities, the show unfolds topnotch kitchen skills and culinary secrets that will make cooking dishes effortless.

programme.title: Lutong Bahay
programme.desc: A magazine show that features a delightful mix of heartfelt stories and mouthwatering dishes, where every recipe has a tale to tell -- heartwarming tales of triumph, challenges, and cherished memories.

programme.title: Security Unlimited
programme.desc: Comedy trio the Hui Brothers' produce and star in this hilarious and off the wall laugh-fest and box-office hit, Security Unlimited. Michael Hui stars as head security guard Chou, whose unorthodox, and at times ridiculous approach to training his subordinates doesn't seem to go down well with his boss, Fan (Stanley Fung). Sam (Sam Hui) and Bruce (Ricky Hui) are Chou's favorite targets of abuse, but Chou soon finds the shoe is on the other foot when Ricky gets promoted after saving the day in a botched bank heist.

programme.title: Project A
programme.desc: This is Hong Kong at the turn of the century. The South China Sea is crawling with smugglers, cut-throats and pirates and none is more successful than the gang led by the notorious pirate Lo. Government forces invariably lose to Lo. Finally the Government looks the other way whenever Lo is around. Young seaman Jackie Chan, so far better known for his bar room fights, resigns from the Marine Force. He plans to stage a personal vendetta against Lo. Jackie gets the help of Samo Hung, little knowing Samo has his own axe to grind. Jackie and Samo suffer an inglorious drubbing in the hands of Lo. Jackie, now completely incensed, decides to don the uniform once again. He finds young commander Yuen Biao sympathetic to his cause but adamant against his antics...

programme.title: Once Upon A Time In China
programme.desc: Set in 1875, China. Wong Fei Hung and his disciples take on the unscrupulous dealers who are trying to entice gullible Chinese into slavery in America.

programme.title: Tears & Triumph
programme.desc: Cai Mingjun was dumped by her boyfriend when he discovered she was pregnant. With the help and support from her friend Xu Yuyuan, Cai managed to give birth to the baby. For years, she struggled hard to build up her career to provide for the child‘s living. She was doing well when all of a sudden, her company was acquired by Xie's family. This led to a change in the company‘s policy and Cai came face to face with his ex-lover Zuo Sicheng. Zuo had married the daughter of Xie family and was trusted by his father-in-law. He became Cai's boss and made life very hard for her. He abused her with his power when he discovered that his wife Cai, he tried to make her resign. Fortunately, Xie Shiwen, the only son of the Xie family, intervened to lend Cai a hand...

programme.title: Security Unlimited
programme.desc: Comedy trio the Hui Brothers' produce and star in this hilarious and off the wall laugh-fest and box-office hit, Security Unlimited. Michael Hui stars as head security guard Chou, whose unorthodox, and at times ridiculous approach to training his subordinates doesn't seem to go down well with his boss, Fan (Stanley Fung). programme.title: Triads The Inside Story
programme.desc: Hung Hing Family boss Lee Qun was ambushed on his way to Macau. His heir Lee Mun-ho flew back from the States for the funeral. Mun-ho, who did not want to mingle with the mobsters, planned to return to the States for good after wrapping up his father's business in Hong Kong. However, through his intelligence and managerial skills, he turned Hung Hing into a well organized business structure. On the other hand, Yeung Kong, a young and ambitious mobster who was brought up under the old Triad tradition, strongly opposed Mun-ho...

programme.title: How This Tiny Country Became The Best At Night Trains In Europe
programme.desc: As Europe's rail giants scrapped their sleeper cars, one tiny country went all‑in. Austria's OEBB has built the continent's largest night train network, carrying millions across borders while everyone else hit the brakes. Here's how Austria quietly conquered the night.

programme.title: E1 - Learning to Do the Right Thing!
programme.desc: Join Buster as he learns to do the right thing! When Buster accidentally breaks the class flower, he panics & tries to cover it up, but soon learns that telling the truth is always the best thing to do. Then, when he & Daddy spot a steam train speeding out of control, they know they have to do the right thing! They race after the train & save the day! From cleaning up his toys to helping a puppy, Buster is always trying to do the right thing.

programme.title: E1 - Epic Rescues with Grandma Gecko!
programme.desc: Grandma Gecko is here to help with some epic rescues! The action starts when Weasel's accelerator gets stuck & he can't stop driving! Grandma Gecko & Gecko hop on a motorbike for a high-speed chase to save him. Then, when lots of vehicles get flat tires from nails on the road, Gecko feels the pressure & calls his Grandma to help him speedily change all the tires. From building a wind turbine to saving Blue, Grandma can do it all!

programme.title: E4 - A Magical Sky Adventure!
programme.desc: Go on a magical sky adventure with Twinkle! First, discover the variety of cloud shapes & sizes, from triangles & squares to star-shaped clouds! Then, daydream high in the clouds with Twinkle & Mr. Moon, where her magical stardust makes the moon sneeze & keeps changing colors! The sky-high fun continues as Twinkle soars through the sky on a magical journey to explore all the vibrant colors of the rainbow.

programme.title: E3 - Gentle Lessons & Bedtime Songs!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some gentle lessons & soothing bedtime songs. First, Twinkle learns about the importance of eating healthy, delicious fruit, like bananas, oranges & grapes. Then, help her find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make! After a long day of learning, it's time to get ready for bed. Listen as Twinkle & Mr. Moon sing a soothing nighttime lullaby to help you relax & drift off to sleep.

programme.title: E3 - Sky High & Super Fun Adventures
programme.desc: Get ready for sky-high & super fun adventures with JJ & his friends! First, Astronauts JJ & Mimi blast off into space, soaring past stars & planets before landing on the moon for a cheesy snack! When Boba loses his special balloon, the friends set off in a hot air balloon craft for a chase of a lifetime. The action continues as JJ & Wally train to be firefighters, but Wally's goofing around turns him into the one who needs saving!

programme.title: E4 - A Big Day of Imagination & Play
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of imagination & play with Mia & Max! First, they decide to let their imagination run free & build a big dollhouse, but Max has more fun pretending to be a dinosaur that knocks it down! Then, Daddy & Twinkle show the kids how much fun can be had with shadow puppets, making all sorts of different animal shapes. The imaginative fun continues as they turn five empty green bottles into fuzzy-armed monsters that Twinkle brings to life!

programme.title: E3 - JJ's Splashin' Jungle Jams!
programme.desc: Get your dancing shoes ready for JJ's Splashin' Jungle Jams! The party starts at the beach with a fun game of freeze dance on the sand. Then, dive deep under the sea to learn the ABCs with jellyfish & shark friends & swim like a beautiful mermaid! The adventure continues deep in the jungle where you can dance with gorillas, snakes & crocodiles. From popping bubbles to doing a silly animal dance, it's a wild party at the beach & in the jungle!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Day on the Farm!
programme.desc: Join Ella for a super fun day at Lellobee City Farm! First, when a nest of baby duck eggs starts to hatch, Ella has to play 'Mummy Duck' to keep all the cute but runaway ducklings together! Then, Rishi organizes all the animals for a friendly game of soccer, where everyone learns each other's animal sounds. The fun day ends with a new arrival, as Ella & Mei find & adopt a stray cat named Bingo, welcoming him to his new home!

programme.title: E4 - A Magical Sky Adventure!
programme.desc: Go on a magical sky adventure with Twinkle! First, discover the variety of cloud shapes & sizes, from triangles & squares to star-shaped clouds! Then, daydream high in the clouds with Twinkle & Mr. Moon, where her magical stardust makes the moon sneeze & keeps changing colors! The sky-high fun continues as Twinkle soars through the sky on a magical journey to explore all the vibrant colors of the rainbow.

Steve Sedgwick, Karen Tso and Julianna Tatelbaum take on the most complex stories of the day with instant analysis on how you can make your money work around the news.

programme.title: Baogu Produces -The Sound Supreme Trio of Ne Zha 2
programme.desc: Fish Liew, Jennifer Yu and Peter Chan Charm Man, have been invited to voice over Cantonese version of the animation film “Ne Zha 2”. This episode features these three actors sharing the joys and challenges of the dubbing process. While Fish tells that Cantonese has been a big challenge for her, Jennifer surprisingly wants to gigantify herself when asked which character's magic she would like to acquire and Peter also praises Fish even more! Let's find more fascinating behind-the-scenes stories they are going to share one by one......

programme.title: Best Supporting Actors: Mad World
programme.desc: The film begins with an old man who has long been absent as a father, picking up his son, who is suffering from bipolar disorder, from a mental hospital. Both men are in deep remorse for the accident that caused the death of the mother. The tension and anxiety boil as they stay with each other in a tiny subdivided flat. As time passes, they realize the pain between one another is not the only confrontation that awaits them; but to face the cruel world that they are living in.

programme.title: Chaos
programme.desc: In one of the darkest and diverse cultural part in the city, there is a minority group who lives in the place where it is full of despair and frustration. At first glance, their desperate living comprises illegal gambling, prostitution as well as drug-dealing. Indeed, their way of living is guided by their own norms and laws, regardless of the entrenched ones prevailing in the general public. Although their norms are chaotic and arbitrary, they do not violate the existence of the conventional ones. Consequently, it can be said that this chaotic region is unique within the city. On one occasion, there are two men, riding in a vehicle, unexpectedly enter this restricted region...
